name: Cody X-VIRUS
description:
💉BONUS chapter: Prank or Plague

It was just a small harmless prank!

Cody wouldn’t let you die just like that for a prank, right? Maybe he’ll just stand there…

You better do something before the injection starts messing up with your body.

[ASYLUM AU]

He’s a little shit in this one, I’m pretty sure he’d get along with Toby. Beg him or beat him up🏃🏼‍♀️

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
creator: Nikushxmi
